name: Backwoods Golf
about: Backwoods Golf is an indoor golf facility featuring a TrackMan simulator and a driving range. The venue offers a range of activities including golf simulators, a driving range, and a full-service restaurant and bar. Located in Brookline, MO, it provides a space for both serious practice and casual play, with food and beverage options available on-site. The facility operates with varied hours throughout the week, closing on Mondays through Wednesdays.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art TrackMan technology for accurate ball tracking and swing analysis
On-site restaurant and bar for a complete experience
Variety of membership options for regular players
Available for corporate events and private parties

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen service available with a dedicated food menu
Full bar service available with specialty drinks and drink menu

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium simulator with drone-mapped courses for high-definition realism

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify whether club rentals are available, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not mentioned, but the venue has its own full kitchen and bar, suggesting that on-site options are preferred.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not specified, but simulator sessions are typically booked by the hour.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Backwoods Golf appears to be kid-friendly, offering a range of activities suitable for families and a welcoming atmosphere.
